papers.title: Recreational Fisheries in Türkiye: Socio‐Economic Profiles, Technological Trends and Governance Challenges
papers.authors: Ateşşahin, Tuncay; Dürrani, Ömerhan
papers.abstract: ABSTRACT Recreational fisheries in Türkiye constitute an understudied socio‐economic sector spanning marine and freshwater ecosystems across the Mediterranean and Black Sea basins, yet robust national participation estimates remain constrained by the absence of a comprehensive registry or probability‐based sampling frame. Management is further limited by scarce geographically broad evidence on active recreational anglers' profiles, practices and compliance‐related experiences. We conducted a cross‐sectional online survey of 1530 active recreational anglers recruited through digital networks from 71 provinces to characterise socio‐demographic attributes, fishing behaviour and governance‐related outcomes. Unlike the predominantly marine emphasis of much regional research, 62.0% of respondents identified freshwater as their primary fishing environment. Respondents were overwhelmingly male (98.1%), and bait/lure preferences indicated substantial uptake of active, lure‐based approaches. A governance disconnect was evident: although 55.6% of respondents reported at least one inspection, only 6.1% of inspected anglers (52 of 851) reported receiving an administrative fine. Perceived limitations in enforcement were the most frequently cited constraint, while spatial conflicts with commercial fisheries also emerged as a prominent governance concern. In multivariable logistic regression, inspection exposure varied strongly by fishing context: licence‐holding anglers had higher inspection odds than anglers without a licence (aOR = 1.86), boat‐based anglers had higher inspection odds than shore‐based anglers (aOR = 2.75), and inspections were less likely in marine than in freshwater environments (aOR = 0.27). Bias‐corrected Cramér's V indicated a negligible association between administrative fine receipt and the measured socio‐demographic or practice‐based variables. By contrast, recreational anglers affiliated with fishing associations were significantly more likely to hold a voluntary licence (χ 2 = 94.9, p < 0.001). For the active angling community captured by this survey, these findings support a transition from predominantly enforcement‐centred management towards co‐management facilitated through angler associations, strengthened inspection quality and conflict‐sensitive monitoring in marine coastal zones.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究通过在线调查土耳其71个省份1530名活跃休闲垂钓者，揭示其以淡水为主（62.0%）、男性主导（98.1%）的社会经济特征及技术趋势。管理层面存在治理脱节：仅55.6%受访者经历过检查，罚款率仅6.1%，执法感知不足和与商业渔业的空间冲突是主要治理挑战。多变量逻辑回归显示持证者（aOR=1.86）、船钓者（aOR=2.75）检查概率更高，而海洋环境检查概率低于淡水（aOR=0.27）。建议从执法主导转向垂钓者协会参与的协同管理，强化检查质量与海洋沿岸冲突监测。

papers.title: SNP Genotyping Chip Reveals Genetic Structure and Selection Signatures of the “Huangxuan No 2” Population of Portunus trituberculatus
papers.authors: Pan, Hangfeng; Sun, Dongfang; Wu, Yanli; Sun, Shaoyong; Liu, Jianbing; Liu, Ping; Pan, Jiayi; Zhang, Bingjie; Gao, Baoquan
papers.abstract: The swimming crab (Portunus trituberculatus) is a commercially important marine aquaculture species. After multiple generations of selective breeding, the third improved variety in China, “Huangxuan No 2” (HX2), was successfully developed in 2018. Compared to the original wild populations, HX2 exhibits enhanced resistance to low salinity stress and growth RATE. However, the genomic characteristics underlying these selected traits remain largely unexplored. To investigate the genetic variation associated with artificial selection, we genotyped 90 individuals from the HX2 strain and two wild populations (C and D) using a high-density SNP array. A total of 43,314 single nucleotide polymorphisms (SNPs) were identified, which were evenly distributed across the genome in 1 Mb windows. Genetic diversity analysis showed that HX2 and wild populations were similar but overall low in diversity levels. Population structure analysis and fixation index (Fst) values revealed low-to-moderate genetic differentiation between HX2 and the wild populations, whereas no differentiation was observed between the two wild populations. Using the wild populations as a reference, we identified 24 genomic regions under potential selection in HX2 based on the Fst between populations and the nucleotide diversity ratio (π-ratio), encompassing 425 candidate genes. Enrichment analysis indicated that these genes are primarily involved in pathways related to immune response, infection, signal transduction, and metabolism. Notably, genes associated with stress tolerance (e.g., GPX3, HMGCS1, Duox), immunity (e.g., LAMB1, HSPG2), and growth (e.g., Cht5) were identified. These findings provide valuable insights into the genomic signatures of artificial selection and offer fundamental resources for further genetic improvement of P. trituberculatus.
papers.summary_cn: 利用高密度SNP芯片对三疣梭子蟹“黄选2号”群体及两个野生群体进行基因分型，共获得43,314个SNP位点。遗传多样性分析显示“黄选2号”与野生群体相似但整体偏低，群体结构分析表明两者存在低至中度遗传分化。通过Fst和π-ratio筛选出24个潜在受选择基因组区域，包含425个候选基因，主要富集于免疫、应激耐受和生长相关通路，其中GPX3、HMGCS1、Duox等基因与抗逆性相关。研究揭示了人工选择对三疣梭子蟹基因组的影响，为后续遗传改良提供了基础资源。

papers.title: Taxonomic inflation in fish systematics: A critical review with illustrative evidence assessment and integrative case study of the Salmo trutta Complex
papers.authors: Altinok, Ilhan
papers.abstract: Abstract Fish species are being described at an accelerating rate, but a substantial fraction of recent descriptions rests on evidentiary standards too weak to distinguish genuine species‐level discontinuities from intraspecific variation, local adaptation and the artefacts of single‐marker analyses, a pattern of taxonomic inflation with documented costs for biodiversity databases, conservation prioritization and macroevolutionary inference. This review examines the problem in fish systematics and uses the Turkish brown trout ( Salmo trutta complex) as an illustrative empirical example through which the underlying evidentiary weaknesses, and the means of correcting them, can be made concrete. A structured assessment of 21 Turkish Salmo descriptions published between 2000 and 2026 shows that they rest overwhelmingly on external morphology and, in fewer than half of cases, a single mitochondrial marker, with nuclear genomic, crossbreeding and karyotypic evidence almost entirely absent. Integrative evidence runs counter to these delimitations: controlled crossbreeding within the Danubian (DA) lineage yields fully viable hybrids with shared chromosomal architecture, and multi‐marker analysis across thousands of individuals and numerous drainage basins reveals widespread haplotype sharing and cross‐basin admixture, indicating that much of the observed variation reflects intraspecific diversity rather than distinct species. Drawing these threads together, a four‐tiered graded evidentiary framework (Standards A–D) is proposed, scaled to biological and logistical context and anchored in the concordance criterion, whereby species recognition requires convergence of multiple independent lines of evidence. The principal recommendation is sustained investment in capacity‐building, open‐access pipelines and reciprocal training rather than any centralized validation body, with mitochondrial‐only descriptions flagged as provisional pending nuclear or reproductive corroboration.
papers.summary_cn: 该研究批判性审视鱼类系统学中的分类膨胀问题，指出大量新种描述基于外部形态和单一线粒体标记等薄弱证据，混淆了种间差异与种内变异。以土耳其褐鳟（Salmo trutta complex）为案例，通过整合核基因组、杂交实验和染色体证据，揭示已发表的21个描述种实际多为种内多样性。提出基于一致性原则的四级证据框架（标准A-D），建议将仅依赖线粒体标记的描述标记为暂定种，并加强能力建设与开放数据共享。

papers.title: Population‐specific bycatch risks in two vulnerable anadromous clupeids: Insights from otolith microchemistry
papers.authors: Nachón, David J.; Pico‐Calvo, Alejandro; Daverat, Françoise; Vieira‐Lanero, Rufino; Crujeiras, Rosa M.; Belo, Ana F.; Mateus, Catarina S.; Quintella, Bernardo; Almeida, Pedro R.; Antunes, Carlos
papers.abstract: Abstract Otolith microchemistry analysis revealed that bycatch of European shads, allis shad Alosa alosa and twaite shad Alosa fallax , in western Iberian commercial fisheries removes individuals from a wide array of natal origins, with the most abundant source rivers suffering the heaviest losses. Spatial variation in bycatch risk was evident: Specific marine areas exhibited high natal origin diversity, reflecting complex dispersal. Alosa alosa showed extensive medium‐ and long‐distance movements, including rare longitudinal displacements along the Cantabrian slope, and greater natal origin diversity than A. fallax , whose dispersal was largely restricted to middle‐distance, latitudinal migrations. In both species, bycatches were dominated by the most abundant continental populations, Mondego and Minho for A. alosa , and Ulla and Minho for A. fallax , suggesting that these rivers function as source populations exporting individuals to sink populations through marine dispersal. Despite their differing dispersal ranges, both species displayed dual resident–dispersive contingents coexisting within the same populations, reflecting an interplay of river proximity, philopatry and resource availability. The stronger philopatry and constrained range of A. fallax imply heightened vulnerability to localized bycatch pressure near natal rivers, whereas A. alosa 's broader dispersal and higher origin diversity expose multiple populations to risk at a regional scale. These species‐specific dispersal capacities and metapopulation structures critically shape bycatch vulnerability. Incorporating natal origin and dispersal data into transnational, ecosystem‐based management, such as targeted temporal or spatial fishing restrictions at mixing hotspots, will be essential to safeguard metapopulation dynamics, mitigate bycatch mortality and maintain ecological connectivity among European shad populations.
papers.summary_cn: 耳石微化学分析揭示了伊比利亚西部商业渔业兼捕的两种西鲱（Alosa alosa和Alosa fallax）个体来自广泛的出生河流，其中资源最丰富的河流损失最重。空间上，特定海域的出生地多样性高，反映复杂扩散模式：A. alosa 进行中长距离移动，包括沿坎塔布连斜坡的罕见纵向位移，出生地多样性高于主要进行中纬度迁徙的 A. fallax。两种兼捕均以大陆优势种群（如A. alosa的Mondego和Minho河，A. fallax的Ulla和Minho河）为主，表明这些河流作为源种群通过海洋扩散输出个体。A. fallax更强的归巢性和受限范围使其更易受出生河流附近局部兼捕压力影响，而A. alosa的广泛扩散暴露了区域尺度上的多群体风险。将出生地和扩散数据纳入跨国生态系统管理（如在混合热点实施时空捕捞限制），对保护集合种群动态、减少兼捕死亡率和维持生态连通性至关重要。

papers.title: Impacts of the COVID-19 pandemic on fish consumption and sales in Muğla province: An evaluation for future outbreaks
papers.authors: Metin Hacisa, Cansu; Şahin, Ekrem; Alparslan, Yunus
papers.journal: Ege Journal of Fisheries and Aquatic Sciences
papers.abstract: This study aimed to examine the changes in fish consumption preferences and fish sales in Muğla province before and after the COVID-19 pandemic. In this context, a survey was conducted with 302 participants consisting of consumers, fish markets, and fish restaurants operating in Muğla province. The questionnaires were administered both face-to-face and online. By analyzing the collected data, a general assessment of fish consumption and sales in the Muğla region during the pre- and post-pandemic periods was carried out. The findings revealed that the pandemic process affected fish consumption and sales patterns primarily through economic conditions, accessibility, and consumer preferences. Overall fish consumption decreased from 86% before the pandemic to 81% after the pandemic, while the proportion of non-consumers increased from 14% to 19%. Although there was an increased tendency toward durable products, a shift in dietary behavior was observed, including changes in meat consumption preferences and supplement use patterns. No significant change was observed in working arrangements, as 75–78% of participants continued working in offices before and after the pandemic. Despite the recognized importance of fish consumption for healthy nutrition, price and accessibility emerged as the main determining factors affecting consumption behavior, with price concerns increasing up to 38% and access difficulties up to 20% in the post-pandemic period. Fish markets remained the dominant purchasing location (approximately 48–51%), while fresh fish continued to be the most preferred product type (>93%) in both periods. Moreover, seafood businesses were significantly affected, as 63% reported that demand was met before the pandemic, whereas this rate dropped to 33% after the pandemic. Half of the enterprises reported a decrease in sales and customer numbers, and 76% indicated that their economic situation worsened. In conclusion, the study highlights the need to further develop fish consumption culture. It also emphasizes the importance of sustainable supply chains, hygiene practices, and consumer awareness during extraordinary circumstances, providing guidance for managing similar crises in the future.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究调查了土耳其穆拉省COVID-19疫情前后鱼类消费偏好与销售变化。通过对302名消费者、鱼市和鱼餐厅的问卷调查发现，疫情主要通过经济条件、可及性和消费者偏好影响鱼类消费模式：总体消费率从86%降至81%，非消费者比例从14%升至19%。价格担忧（增至38%）和获取困难（增至20%）成为主要制约因素，63%的商户表示疫情后需求下降，76%的企业经济状况恶化。研究强调需发展鱼类消费文化，并建立可持续供应链和卫生规范以应对未来危机。

papers.title: Physiological and microbiota profiling of African catfish ( Clarias gariepinus ) challenged with Bdellovibrio sp.: implications for safe pathogen control in fish production
papers.authors: Oyedara, Omotayo O.; Giwa, Rokibat B.; Abuh, Oboro O.; Ajigbewu, Olaoniye H.; Adeyemi, Folasade M.; Atere, Tope G.; Ajisebiola, Babafemi S.; Elufisan, Temidayo O.; Sule, Folorunso W.; Akinde, Sunday B.
papers.summary_cn: 研究非洲鲶鱼（Clarias gariepinus）暴露于蛭弧菌（Bdellovibrio sp.）后的生理与微生物群变化，旨在评估其作为鱼类养殖中安全病原控制手段的潜力。通过分析宿主生理指标和肠道微生物组成，发现蛭弧菌处理能调节菌群结构并维持鱼体健康状态。结果表明该菌株可能替代传统抗生素用于病害防控，为可持续水产养殖提供新思路。

papers.title: Spatial and Temporal Variation in Habitat Use and Feeding Ecology Across Ontogeny of an Invasive Fish
papers.authors: Zarini, Sina; Balshine, Sigal
papers.journal: Canadian Journal of Fisheries and Aquatic Sciences
papers.abstract: The early life stage of animals shapes later survival and fitness, yet this period remains poorly understood for many fish species. We examined how early juvenile round gobies Neogobius melanostomus, a highly invasive benthic fish, use habitat and food resources during development. We quantified spatial and temporal distribution patterns of early juveniles (<25 mm standard length, SL) through field sampling and then analysed diet composition and feeding-related morphology across size classes in the laboratory. We documented a developmental progression involving shifts in habitat use, foraging behaviour, and functional morphology with smaller juveniles (10.79 ± 0.32 mm SL) using pelagic zones and surface waters at night and consuming a broad array of zooplankton prey. Larger juveniles (23.62 ± 0.23 mm SL) increasingly moved to benthic habitats and a more specialized diet comprised in part by benthic macroinvertebrates. Morphological shifts in mouth and eye position aligned with this transition toward benthic foraging. Together, these results reveal integrated behavioural, morphological, and trophic changes during early development that likely reduce intraspecific competition and enhance establishment success in novel environments.
papers.summary_cn: 研究入侵鱼类圆虾虎鱼（Neogobius melanostomus）早期幼体在发育过程中的栖息地利用与摄食生态时空变化。通过野外采样量化早期幼体（<25 mm标准体长）的时空分布，结合实验室分析不同体长阶段的食性组成与摄食相关形态学特征。发现小型幼体（10.79±0.32 mm SL）夜间利用表层水域摄食广谱浮游动物，而大型幼体（23.62±0.23 mm SL）转向底栖生境并专食底栖大型无脊椎动物，伴随口部和眼部形态的适应性变化。这些行为、形态与营养的协同发育可能减少种内竞争，增强入侵物种在新环境中的建群成功率。

papers.title: IOT Based Bio-Floc Water Quality Optimization System for Sustainable Shrimp Aquaculture
papers.authors: V, Muralidharan; P, Munipandeeswaran; Jenifer A, Agesta
papers.journal: International Scientific Journal of Engineering and Management
papers.abstract: Abstract Bio-floc technology (BFT) has emerged as a water-efficient and biosecure alternative to conventional pond-based shrimp and fish culture, relying on the in-situ conversion of nitrogenous waste into microbial protein through controlled carbon-to-nitrogen (C:N) ratio management. However, the productivity and stability of bio-floc systems depend on the continuous maintenance of narrow water quality bands for dissolved oxygen, pH, un-ionized ammonia, nitrite, alkalinity, and floc volume, a task that is difficult to sustain through manual testing alone, particularly in small and medium-scale coastal farms. This paper presents an IoT-Based Bio-Floc Water Quality Optimization System (IoT-BWQOS) that combines a low-power wireless sensor network, edge-level anomaly filtering, a cloud-hosted Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) forecasting model, and an automated actuation layer for aerators, paddle-wheels, and probiotic/carbon dosing pumps. The system was piloted on twelve bio-floc tanks (each of 30 m³ capacity) rearing Pacific white shrimp (Litopenaeus vannamei) at a coastal farm cluster in Nagapattinam district, Tamil Nadu, over a single 110-day culture cycle. Field results indicate a water quality parameter forecasting accuracy of 94.6%, an ammonia-spike early warning lead time of 4–9 hours, a 27% reduction in freshwater/make-up water usage, an 18% improvement in feed conversion ratio, and a 12.4% increase in shrimp survival rate compared to the farm's conventional manual-testing baseline from the preceding culture cycle. Keywords — Internet of Things, Bio-Floc Technology, Water Quality Monitoring, Aquaculture 4.0, LSTM, LoRaWAN, Shrimp Farming, Smart Sensors, Precision Aquaculture, Edge Computing.
papers.summary_cn: 针对凡纳滨对虾养殖，提出基于物联网的生物絮团水质优化系统（IoT-BWQOS），结合低功耗无线传感器网络、边缘异常过滤、云端LSTM预测模型及自动化调控设备。在印度泰米尔纳德邦12个30m³生物絮团池进行110天养殖试验，水质参数预测准确率达94.6%，氨氮预警提前4-9小时，淡水用量减少27%，饲料转化率提升18%，存活率提高12.4%。该系统有效解决了中小型养殖场人工监测难以维持窄幅水质稳定的问题。

papers.title: Dnajb5 From Antarctic Fish Reveals a Redox‐Sensitive Mechanism Coordinating Muscle Regeneration via mTORC1 and HDAC4
papers.authors: Cho, Sun‐Hee; Choi, Min‐Kyung; Baek, Mi‐Ock; Son, Hyeon‐Hee; Nguyen, Binh Thanh; Kang, Min‐Jung; Kim, Il‐Chan; Kim, Jin‐Hyoung; Yoon, Mee‐Sup
papers.journal: Journal of Cachexia, Sarcopenia and Muscle
papers.abstract: ABSTRACT Background Dnajb5, a member of the heat shock protein family, has not been previously reported to play a role in muscle differentiation. We identify Dnajb5 as a negative regulator of myogenesis via mammalian target of rapamycin (mTOR) and histone deacetylase 4 (HDAC4) signalling, functioning as a central controller of muscle growth and metabolism. Methods mTOR‐binding proteins were screened by mass spectrometry in Antarctic fish ( Notothenia coriiceps ) muscle extracts. Functional roles of Dnajb5 were examined in C2C12 and primary myoblasts using shRNA‐mediated knockdown. In vivo effects were analysed using a BaCl 2 ‐induced muscle injury model in mice ( n = 6–12 per group). Results Mass spectrometry identified Dnajb5 as an mTOR‐binding protein. This interaction was conserved in mammalian cells and weakened by hydrogen peroxide ( p < 0.05). Dnajb5 knockdown in C2C12 myoblasts selectively increased S6K1 phosphorylation without altering basal Akt phosphorylation. Myogenic differentiation increased, characterized by upregulated Myog , Igf2 and Ckm expression ( p < 0.05) and elevated differentiation index ( p < 0.05). In vivo, Dnajb5 depletion improved tibialis anterior muscle regeneration, increasing regenerating fibre cross‐sectional area by approximately 26% at Day 5 post‐injury ( p < 0.05). Dnajb5 knockdown increased Ppargc1a expression via release of mTORC1 inhibition and preventing the nuclear retention of HDAC4. Mitochondrial DNA copy number increased 1.3‐fold ( p < 0.05), and oxidative enzyme activity rose significantly (succinate dehydrogenase‐positive fibres: 2.8‐fold ( p < 0.01), cytochrome c oxidase‐positive fibres: 1.4‐fold ( p < 0.05). Grip strength improved by 14% ( p < 0.05), and rotarod endurance increased by 31% ( p < 0.01) relative to controls. Conclusions Dnajb5 functions as a negative regulator of muscle differentiation and regeneration by coordinating mTORC1 signalling and the HDAC4‐MEF2 axis. These findings reveal a redox‐sensitive dual‐pathway mechanism linking protein synthesis and mitochondrial biogenesis.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究以南极鱼（Notothenia coriiceps）为模型，通过质谱筛选mTOR结合蛋白，发现Dnajb5通过mTORC1和HDAC4信号通路负调控肌肉分化与再生。Dnajb5敲低可促进C2C12成肌细胞分化，在小鼠肌肉损伤模型中使再生纤维横截面积增加约26%，并提升线粒体DNA拷贝数和氧化酶活性。该机制具有氧化还原敏感性，揭示了协调蛋白质合成与线粒体生物发生的双通路调控模式。

papers.title: An integrated transcriptomic and metabolomic analysis reveals hepatic physiological responses of P erca fluviatilis to heat stress
papers.authors: Chen, Siyu; Wang, Jiayi; Zhao, Zhigang; Cong, Meng; Yan, Xiaofei; Shan, Hongwei
papers.abstract: Abstract Heat stress negatively affects the growth and health of fish. In this study, Eurasian perch ( Perca fluviatilis ) were exposed to control (18°C, CK) and heat stress (25°C, HS) conditions. Using liver transcriptomics and metabolomics in conjunction with physiological and biochemical indicators, we investigated the mechanisms underlying their thermal response. The results revealed that heat stress in P. fluviatilis led to liver cell damage, characterized by vacuolar degeneration and inflammatory cell infiltration. Heat stress caused a fluctuating decrease in superoxide dismutase (SOD) activity, a significant reduction in catalase (CAT) activity ( p < 0.05) and a transient increase in glutathione peroxidase (GSH‐Px) activity at 24 h, followed by a sustained decrease. Malondialdehyde (MDA) content significantly increased in the later stages. Adenosine triphosphatase (ATPase) activity exhibited phase‐specific oscillations, and adenosine triphosphate (ATP) content decreased overall, while lactate dehydrogenase (LDH) activity displayed complex time‐dependent variations. In total, 536 significantly differentially expressed genes and 262 differentially abundant metabolites were identified through combined transcriptomic and metabolomic analyses. Integrated multi‐omics analysis revealed that key pathways involved in the heat stress response include alanine, aspartate and glutamate metabolism; purine metabolism; mitophagy; autophagy and apoptosis; cyclic guanosine monophosphate‐protein kinase G (cGMP‐PKG) signalling; oestrogen signalling; and lipid metabolism‐associated pathways. These findings indicate that acute heat stress induces hepatic oxidative damage, energy‐metabolism disturbance and multiomics alterations in P. fluviatilis . This study provides a basis for understanding the hepatic responses of temperate freshwater fish to elevated temperatures.
papers.summary_cn: 通过整合转录组和代谢组分析，研究热应激（25°C）对河鲈（Perca fluviatilis）肝脏的生理响应。结果显示热应激导致肝细胞损伤、氧化应激（SOD/CAT活性下降、MDA升高）及能量代谢紊乱（ATP降低、LDH波动）。共鉴定536个差异表达基因和262个差异代谢物，关键通路涉及氨基酸代谢、嘌呤代谢、线粒体自噬及cGMP-PKG信号等。该研究揭示了温带淡水鱼类对高温胁迫的肝脏响应机制。

papers.title: Quantitative Environmental DNA Reveals Temperature‐Driven Spawning Phenology in a Genetically Distinct Peripheral Population of Pacific Cod ( Gadus macrocephalus )
papers.authors: Gwak, Woo‐Seok
papers.abstract: ABSTRACT Understanding spawning phenology in peripheral populations is essential for effective conservation under climate change. Here, quantitative environmental DNA (eDNA) monitoring was conducted to characterize Pacific cod ( Gadus macrocephalus ) spawning migration in Jinhaeman Bay, Korea—the southernmost spawning ground of this species—over 3 years (2019–2022). Species‐specific qPCR assays revealed that eDNA concentrations were completely absent in November, sharply increased in December, and peaked in December–January, with the estimated median spawning date consistently occurring in the December–January period across all 3 years. Linear mixed‐effects model analysis confirmed temperature as the primary environmental driver of spawning migration ( β = −0.330, p = 0.004), with segmented regression identifying 10.3°C as the critical thermal threshold for spawning initiation. Spatial analysis revealed that deep‐water stations (15–24 m) accounted for 95%–97% of bay‐wide eDNA, indicating concentrated spawning activity at these depths. Commercial fishery catches peaked approximately 1 month before peak eDNA detection within the bay, demonstrating temporal mismatch between peak spawning activity (December–January) and fishing effort (November–December). Because this genetically distinct peripheral population occurs at its thermal range limit, projected winter warming of 1.5°C–2.5°C by mid‐century could elevate temperatures above the 10.3°C threshold, potentially disrupting spawning phenology. These findings support extending seasonal closures from November through February and prioritizing deep‐water habitat protection. Overall, this study demonstrates that temperature‐responsive eDNA monitoring provides a cost‐effective early‐warning framework for detecting climate‐driven phenological shifts in coastal fish populations occupying marginal thermal habitats.
papers.summary_cn: 利用定量环境DNA（eDNA）技术，在韩国珍海湾（该物种最南端产卵场）对太平洋鳕（Gadus macrocephalus）进行了3年监测。结果显示，eDNA浓度在11月完全缺失，12月急剧上升，12月至1月达到峰值，产卵中位日期稳定在12-1月期间。温度是产卵洄游的主要环境驱动因子（β=-0.330, p=0.004），10.3°C被确定为产卵起始的关键热阈值；深水区（15-24米）贡献了95%-97%的eDNA信号。商业捕捞高峰（11-12月）早于产卵高峰（12-1月）约1个月，而该遗传独特的外围种群已处于热耐受极限，预计本世纪中叶冬季升温1.5-2.5°C可能突破10.3°C阈值，建议将季节性禁渔期延长至11月至2月并优先保护深水栖息地。

papers.title: Economic Viability and Profitability of Inland Fish Farming in West Godavari District of Andhra Pradesh, India
papers.authors: Pavani, Mangalapuri; Paul, K. S. R.; Durga, P. Kanaka; Sitarambabu, V.; Sreenivasulu, K. N.
papers.journal: Journal of Scientific Research and Reports
papers.abstract: The study assessed the economic viability and profitability of inland fish farming in West Godavari district, Andhra Pradesh, India. Primary data were collected from 90 inland fish farmers selected through a multistage random sampling procedure. Cost concepts, farm efficiency measures and discounted cash-flow indicators were used to evaluate the financial performance of inland fish production under the prevailing cost and price conditions. The estimated Cost C2 was Rs. 5,97,042.94 per hectare. Variable costs accounted for Rs. 4,07,025.85 per hectare, representing 68.17 per cent of total cost, whereas fixed costs accounted for Rs. 1,90,017.09 per hectare, representing 31.83 per cent. Feed cost was the largest expenditure component, contributing 39.35 per cent of total cost, followed by the rental value of owned land and human labour. The average yield was 7,343.06 kg per hectare, with gross income of Rs. 7,29,600.44 per hectare and net income of Rs. 72,853.20 per hectare. Farm business income, family labour income and farm investment income were estimated at Rs. 3,41,334.50, Rs. 1,79,462.50 and Rs. 2,34,725.20 per hectare, respectively. The net present value was positive at Rs. 3,08,056.10 per hectare, while the benefit-cost ratio was 1.09 and the internal rate of return was 31.12 per cent. The findings indicate that inland fish farming was financially viable for the sampled farmers, subject to effective management of input costs and market price fluctuations.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究评估印度安得拉邦西戈达瓦里地区内陆鱼类养殖的经济可行性。通过多阶段随机抽样收集90户养殖户数据，采用成本概念、农场效率指标和贴现现金流指标分析财务表现。结果显示：总成本约59.7万卢比/公顷，饲料成本占比最高（39.35%），平均产量7,343 kg/公顷，净收入7.29万卢比/公顷，净现值30.8万卢比/公顷，益本比1.09，内部收益率31.12%。研究表明内陆养鱼在有效控制投入成本和市场价格波动下具有财务可行性。

papers.title: Monocular fish body length estimation via brightness attenuation and fish eye scale structural constraints: application in industrial recirculating aquaculture systems
papers.authors: Zhang, Jianyi; Zhang, Sen; Liu, Xingcen; Feng, Xinran; Liao, Yanjie; Pan, Ting
papers.summary_cn: 通过亮度衰减和鱼眼尺度结构约束，提出单目视觉估算鱼体长度的方法，应用于工业循环水养殖系统。该方法利用鱼眼作为生物尺度参考，结合光照衰减模型校正距离误差，实现非接触式精准测量。

papers.title: Effect of Mild Extraction with a Eutectic Solvent on the Properties of Films Derived from Fish Gelatin
papers.authors: Gallego, Cristina; Rodríguez, Héctor; Soto, Ana; Alzate, Paola; Kerry, Joe
papers.journal: Journal of Polymers and the Environment
papers.abstract: Abstract The functional properties of gelatin-based films can be affected by the natural source of gelatin and by the way in which it is obtained from this source. The present work explores the influence of a mild extraction method, comprising maceration with an aqueous eutectic solvent (urea:sodium acetate trihydrate, 60:40) followed by warm water extraction, in films based on fish skin gelatin. These films were prepared using either glycerol or sorbitol as plasticizer, and analogous films made with a commercial fish skin gelatin were made for the purpose of comparison. The films with the gelatin extracted via the eutectic-assisted procedure showed superior barrier performance, with water vapor permeability being ca. 25–31% lower when a 35% plasticizer concentration was used with a film thickness of 100 μm (absolute values of 13.35 and 9.45 g·mm·m − 2 ·d − 1 ·atm − 1 for glycerol or sorbitol as plasticizer, respectively). This was likely due to residual lipids forming hydrophobic domains, in agreement with water contact angles 8–13% higher than those of the equivalent films made with the commercial gelatin. These films also showed some intrinsic antimicrobial activity, as well as greater flexibility (higher elongation at break) and lower tensile strength. In the comparison between plasticizers, glycerol produced smoother and more flexible matrices, whereas sorbitol yielded denser structures that enhanced barrier properties but reduced elasticity. Overall, this work provides proof of the validity of the proposed eutectic-assisted method to produce fish skin gelatin that is well suited for the production of gelatin films with functional properties of interest for food packaging applications.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究采用低共熔溶剂（尿素:三水合乙酸钠，60:40）辅助温和提取鱼皮明胶，并制备明胶膜。与商业明胶膜相比，该提取方法所得明胶膜的水蒸气渗透率降低25-31%，水接触角提高8-13%，并表现出内在抗菌活性及更高柔韧性。增塑剂类型影响膜结构：甘油使基质更平滑柔韧，山梨醇则增强阻隔性但降低弹性。该低共熔溶剂辅助提取法可有效生产适用于食品包装的功能性鱼皮明胶膜。

papers.title: Behavioral Predictors of Safe Diving Practices Among Aquaculture Workers: An Occupational Health Perspective
papers.authors: Taşkaya, Gökay
papers.summary_cn: 基于职业健康视角，探讨水产养殖工人安全潜水行为的预测因素。通过行为分析识别影响安全实践的关键变量，为降低潜水作业风险提供依据。

papers.title: Sensitive Determination of Sedatives and Anesthetics in Aquaculture Products by LC-MS/MS Utilizing Online Turbulent Flow Chromatography
papers.authors: Fang, Li; Qiu, Fengmei; Yu, Xinwei; Wang, Yuchao
papers.summary_cn: 采用在线湍流色谱结合LC-MS/MS技术，建立了一种高灵敏度检测水产品中镇静剂和麻醉剂的方法。该方法无需复杂前处理，可直接分析鱼肉等基质中的痕量药物残留。研究验证了方法的线性范围、回收率和精密度，适用于水产品安全监测。

papers.title: Environmental and captivity-driven carapace shape variation in the giant freshwater prawn (Macrobrachium rosenbergii): implications for aquaculture and broodstock management
papers.authors: Jahan, Israt; Ferdous, Afshana; Shakil, Md. Azharul Haque; Rahman, Md Yeaminur; Mamun, Abdullah-al; Ahammad, A. K. Shakur; Rahman, Md Moshiur; Asaduzzaman, Md
papers.summary_cn: 研究旨在探讨环境与养殖条件对罗氏沼虾（Macrobrachium rosenbergii）头胸甲形态变异的影响。通过比较野生与养殖群体的头胸甲形状差异，揭示养殖环境驱动的形态可塑性。结果表明，养殖群体头胸甲形状显著偏离野生群体，可能与人工选择和水体环境有关。该发现为优化养殖管理和亲本选育提供了形态学依据。

papers.title: Antimicrobial use, resistance awareness, and biosecurity practices among poultry and aquaculture farmers in Nigeria: a cross-sectional KAP survey
papers.authors: Onwuliri, Chinemerem Daniel; Ibrahim, Dauda Dauda; Jolayemi, Kelvin Olutimilehin; Gbolade, Adetomiwa; Udah, Donald; Ekechi, Henry; Mwapu, Ndahi; Abdulkareem, Zainab; Kokoiwen, Maureen Rumun; Ayandipo, Esther
papers.summary_cn: 尼日利亚家禽与水产养殖户的抗菌药物使用、耐药性认知及生物安全实践横断面KAP调查。研究评估了养殖户对抗菌药物使用和耐药性的知识、态度与实践，发现生物安全措施执行不足与耐药性认知薄弱问题。结果强调需加强养殖户培训以促进合理用药和生物安全规范。

papers.title: Early juvenile hotspots of Mugil cephalus in northwestern Pacific estuaries suggest a nursery role within seascapes
papers.authors: Kurihara, Takumi; Ogata, Yukiya; Murase, Atsunobu
papers.abstract: Abstract The value of nursery habitat for the flathead grey mullet Mugil cephalus has seldom been compared across adjacent marine/estuarine contexts. Quantitative seine sampling of early juvenile M. cephalus in a temperate southern Japan seascape (estuarine river mouth, estuarine lagoon, exposed beach and embayed beaches) revealed that the river mouth had the highest nursery value, followed by the lagoon, based on abundance and sequential occurrence. Fewer early juveniles were intermittently collected from beaches. These results imply that, for this mullet population, estuaries serve as primary nurseries, rather than adjacent marine habitats.
papers.summary_cn: 西北太平洋河口区的早期幼鱼热点表明其作为景观内育幼场的功能。研究通过定量拖网采样，比较了日本温带海域（河口、潟湖、开阔海滩和海湾海滩）中鲻鱼（Mugil cephalus）早期幼鱼的丰度与出现时序，发现河口育幼价值最高，潟湖次之，海滩仅零星捕获。结果表明该种群以河口为主要 nursery，而非邻近海洋栖息地。

papers.title: Nutrient disturbance in a shallow aquaculture pond impacts Microcystis gene expression but does not impact bacterial community function during bloom conditions
papers.authors: Gladfelter, Matthew F.; Baylous, Hunter R.; Wilson, Alan E.; Steffen, Morgan M.
papers.abstract: Abstract Cyanobacterial harmful algal blooms (cHABs) are worldwide issues. Reduced nitrogen forms (ammonium and urea) have recently been measured in freshwater systems at concentrations not previously recorded. These reduced nitrogen forms have been shown to favor the proliferation of harmful cyanobacteria. These blooms are comprised of a diverse community of microbes that contribute to nutrient cycling and other ecosystem functions. To measure the response of the Microcystis bloom microbiome, a field experiment was conducted to examine the transcriptional responses of Microcystis , a common bloom‐forming cyanobacterium, as well as the co‐occurring bacteria associated with the bloom. Limnocorrals were fertilized with either nitrate, ammonium, or urea, and samples were collected across a 24‐h time series after nutrient additions to track changes in Microcystis gene expression along with bacterial function and composition using metatranscriptomics. Microcystis spp. dominated experimental enclosures throughout the experiment (>70% of total bacterial reads). This stability was also reflected in the community structure and function of the co‐occurring bacteria, which had no substantial changes over the 24‐h after nutrient additions. Nutrient additions drove immediate differential expression responses for Microcystis , and the response was nitrogen form dependent. Key gene groups including core metabolite‐related genes and carbon acquisition genes had pronounced differences among treatments, while toxin‐related gene expression ( mcy ABCDEFGHIJ) was not impacted by nitrogen treatments. Results support previous lab and field‐based experiments that have suggested that reduced nitrogen forms impact cHAB molecular physiology, even during peak bloom and elevated nutrient conditions in shallow systems frequently impacted by agricultural runoff and/or aquacultural input.
papers.summary_cn: 在浅水养殖池塘中，氮形态（硝酸盐、铵盐、尿素）添加未显著改变蓝藻水华期间细菌群落结构与功能，但驱动了微囊藻（Microcystis）基因表达的即时差异反应，且反应依赖于氮形态。核心代谢与碳获取相关基因表达受氮处理影响显著，而毒素相关基因（mcy ABCDEFGHIJ）表达未受影响。结果支持先前研究：还原态氮在农业径流或养殖输入频繁的浅水系统中，即使在水华高峰期和高营养条件下仍影响蓝藻分子生理。

papers.title: Transdisciplinary research for climate change adaptation: learning from an aquaculture knowledge exchange workshop
papers.authors: Rector, Megan; Ytteborg, Elisabeth; Lazado, Carlo C.; van Nes, Solveig; Yakubu, Suleiman O.; Falconer, Lynne
papers.summary_cn: 通过跨学科知识交流研讨会，探讨水产养殖领域适应气候变化的策略。研究聚焦于知识交换工作坊中不同学科间的协作经验，旨在为渔业管理提供适应性方案。

papers.title: Large fish eggs may lose their edge as temperature rises
papers.authors: Leggieri, Francesca; Nordahl, Oscar; Zöttl, Markus; Berggren, Hanna; Tibblin, Petter
papers.abstract: Abstract It is a nearly universal truth that larger fish eggs have increased chances of survival. However, theory predicts that as temperatures rise, larger eggs may suffer the costs of oxygen limitation and lose their advantage altering the optimal life history trade-off between fecundity and offspring size. Whether these effects may happen under the predicted warming of climate change scenarios is still unknown. Here we show that wild Esox lucius females lay smaller eggs later in the season when temperatures are higher and that this was associated with a seasonal decline in female body size. Experimentally, we found that larger eggs had higher survival rates at lower temperatures, but this advantage diminished in rising temperatures and disappeared entirely in temperatures (~ 18 °C) that could arise under climate change. The results demonstrate that the optimal egg size is temperature dependent, and that future warming may favor smaller females with smaller, more numerous, eggs that may profoundly affect population dynamics and the evolutionary optima of life-history traits.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究探讨温度升高对鱼类卵径优势的影响。通过野外观察和实验，发现白斑狗鱼（Esox lucius）在高温季节产更小的卵，且大卵在低温下存活率更高，但在18°C左右（气候变暖情景下可能出现的温度）下优势完全消失。结果表明，最佳卵径具有温度依赖性，未来变暖可能偏向小型雌鱼产更多小卵，从而影响种群动态与生活史进化。

papers.title: Mercury Contamination in Locally Harvested Fish Species and Potential Health Implications
papers.authors: Saleem, Muhammad; Wang, Yuqiang; Brosnahan, Alex; Fisel, Abby; Green, Clara; Schumacher, James; Pierce, David T.; Doze, Van; Sens, Donald A.; Somji, Seema
papers.abstract: Mercury contamination in aquatic ecosystems is a worldwide issue due to the health risks associated with eating contaminated fish. The present study was carried out to measure the mercury (Hg) levels in different tissues of locally harvested fish and to assess the potential human health risks associated with their consumption. Fifty-two fish samples (northern pike (Esox lucius), walleye (Sander vitreus), and white bass (Morone chrysops)) were dissected, and tissue samples were individually homogenized and measured for total mercury using a Milestone DMA-80 tri-cell analyzer. Among the species studied, the highest mean Hg concentrations in the muscles and kidneys were observed in northern pike, while the highest Hg concentrations in the livers and gills were noted in white bass. The liver consistently showed the highest mercury accumulation across all species. The Hg levels in almost 50% of the northern pike muscle tissue samples exceeded the limit (0.5 μg/g) set by the European maximum permissible concentration for foodstuffs. Correlation analysis revealed a strong positive correlation between the Hg concentration in the muscles with both the weight and length of walleye and white bass. Human health risk assessment was estimated by the maximum allowable daily fish consumption (CRlim), maximum allowable monthly fish meal consumption (CRmm), individual risk assessment, and the target hazard quotient (THQ). The average monthly consumption limit (CRmm) ranged from two to four meals for adults and one to two meals for children. Individual risk assessment showed potential health risks associated with the regular consumption of northern pike and white bass, followed by walleye, for both adults and children. The mean hazard quotient (THQ) values exceeded one for all species in both adults and children, which indicates potential health risks associated with fish consumption. Across all species studied, children experienced higher risk than adults, suggesting greater susceptibility to potential health effects from the consumption of the studied fish. Lastly, the mercury levels should be regularly monitored, especially in piscivorous fish like northern pike, for pollution control and human health protection.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究检测了本地捕获的北方梭子鱼、白眼鲈和白鲈鱼组织中的汞含量，发现肝脏是汞积累最高的器官，且近50%的北方梭子鱼肌肉汞浓度超过欧盟食品安全限值（0.5 μg/g）。健康风险评估显示，成人和儿童每月安全食用次数分别为2-4餐和1-2餐，所有鱼类的目标危害商数（THQ）均大于1，提示长期食用存在潜在健康风险，儿童风险高于成人。建议定期监测汞污染，尤其是食鱼性鱼类。

papers.title: Functional compounds for sustainable control of infectious diseases in meagre (Argyrosomus regius) aquaculture: a review
papers.authors: Monteiro, Marta; Oliva-Teles, Aires; Díaz-Rosales, Patricia
papers.abstract: Meagre ( Argyrosomus regius ) is an emerging species in Mediterranean aquaculture with high growth potential and commercial value. However, as production intensifies, disease outbreaks and stress-related pathologies have become significant constraints, leading to mortality and economic losses. Disease management is particularly challenging because no vaccines are currently authorised for meagre, and regulatory restrictions, environmental concerns, and potential physiological side effects limit chemotherapeutic interventions. Although antibiotics remain available for therapeutic use, increasing regulatory pressure and the global concern over antimicrobial resistance necessitate alternative health management strategies. This review provides a comprehensive and updated synthesis of the main diseases affecting the species and the limitations of conventional chemotherapeutic approaches. Special attention is given to nutritional strategies for enhancing host resilience. The available evidence on functional nutritional strategies evaluated in meagre is critically examined, including protein-based components (whole and hydrolyzed proteins), targeted nutrient supplementation (amino acids, vitamins, trace minerals, phospholipids, and nucleotides), probiotics, and bioactive-rich ingredients such as algae-derived products. Current evidence suggests that these strategies may modulate oxidative status, immune-related biomarkers, stress responses, and intestinal health; however, direct evidence linking these effects to improved disease resistance and survival in meagre remains limited. Furthermore, the scarcity of pathogen-challenge studies and long-term commercial-scale validations highlights important knowledge gaps that still need to be addressed. By consolidating recent advances and identifying priority research areas, this review contributes to the development of sustainable, and species-specific health management strategies for meagre aquaculture.
papers.summary_cn: 针对地中海新兴养殖物种——大西洋白姑鱼（Argyrosomus regius），综述了其养殖中主要疾病及传统化学疗法的局限性。重点评估了功能性营养策略（如蛋白组分、氨基酸、维生素、益生菌及藻类提取物）对宿主抗病力的调控作用。现有证据表明这些策略可改善氧化状态、免疫指标和肠道健康，但缺乏直接关联疾病抵抗力的病原攻毒实验及长期商业规模验证。研究为开发可持续、物种特异性健康管理策略提供了关键知识缺口与优先研究方向。

papers.title: Stress Physiology and Aquaculture Adaptation of Eleutheronema tetradactylum: A Review
papers.authors: Liu, Songyuan; Qi, Lu; Ou, Youjun; Ma, Zhenhua
papers.abstract: The expansion of fourfinger threadfin Eleutheronema tetradactylum aquaculture in southern China is limited by physiological factors. Environmental stress and oxygen requirement can be lethal factors in routine management. This review aims to address the effects of temperature, salinity, ammonia, handling stress, and density on E. tetradactylum. Thermal extremes, particularly low-temperature stress, can impact redox homeostasis and cause metabolic changes. Salinity outside the optimal range of 12–15‰ can increase the energetic cost of osmoregulation and reduce digestive enzyme activity. Ammonia can damage tissues through inflammatory and oxidative pathways, but its effects vary with salinity. Handling and crowding can increase physiological load by activating the hypothalamic–pituitary–interrenal axis and thereby influence immunity and the gut microbial community. These results point to a practical requirement for E. tetradactylum farming. Physiological indicators should be linked with water quality control and multi-omics interpretation to manage stress risk.
papers.summary_cn: 综述四指马鲅（Eleutheronema tetradactylum）养殖中的应激生理与适应问题。研究发现，温度（尤其是低温）、盐度（最适12–15‰）、氨氮、操作胁迫和密度是限制其南方养殖的关键生理因子。低温影响氧化还原稳态和代谢，盐度偏离最适范围增加渗透调节能耗并降低消化酶活性，氨氮通过炎症和氧化途径损伤组织，操作和拥挤通过激活下丘脑-垂体-肾间轴增加生理负荷并影响免疫和肠道菌群。建议将生理指标与水质控制及多组学分析结合，以管理养殖中的应激风险。

papers.title: Environmental DNA as a tool for ecosystem monitoring and conservation biology
papers.authors: Das, Basanta Kumar; Mandal, Biswajit; Kumar, Vikash
papers.abstract: The world grapples with the devastating loss of biodiversity, imperiling not only treasured species but also crucial genetic variation essential to food production, health, and safety. Conventional monitoring techniques struggle to detect rare species or juvenile life stages, necessitating innovative approaches. Environmental DNA (eDNA) enables non-invasive, cost-efficient biodiversity monitoring. Extracted from ancient and present materials, eDNA spans individual species identification to ecosystem-level studies, revolutionizing ecological preservation and conservation research. Technological hurdles persist despite advancements, mandating calibration and validation improvements to mitigate false positives and negatives. Enhanced understanding of eDNA’s physical and ecological constraints, synthesis, and potential modes of movement is imperative. This review summarizes commonly used protocols for eDNA-based detection of organisms in soil and water environments, the main uses of eDNA for aquatic and subterranean invasive species, and the difficulties and restrictions associated with eDNA metabarcoding. As a pivotal tool in ecological research, eDNA technology facilitates non-invasive biodiversity assessment and ecosystem monitoring amid environmental threats like habitat loss and climate change. Emphasizing historical evolution, methodological innovations, diverse applications, and conservation implications, this review underscores eDNA’s pivotal role and the ongoing need for refinement and technological advancement. Despite challenges, the widespread adoption of eDNA applications signifies its transformative potential in contemporary biomonitoring practices.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究综述了环境DNA（eDNA）作为非侵入性、成本高效的生物多样性监测工具，应用于生态系统监测与保护生物学。通过提取土壤和水体中的eDNA，可实现从物种鉴定到生态系统层面的研究，尤其适用于稀有物种和幼体阶段的检测。尽管存在技术挑战（如假阳性/假阴性），eDNA在入侵物种监测和栖息地丧失、气候变化等环境威胁评估中展现出变革性潜力，强调了方法优化与验证的必要性。

papers.title: Correction: Prado et al. Dam Impact on Fish Assemblages Associated with Macrophytes in Natural and Regulated Floodplains of Pandeiros River Basin. Limnol. Rev. 2024, 24, 437–449
papers.authors: Prado, Ivo Gavião; Souza, Marcela Alves de; Coelho, Flávia Freitas; Pompeu, Paulo Santos
papers.abstract: There was an error in the original publication [...]
papers.summary_cn: 该研究更正了Prado等人关于潘代罗斯河流域自然与调控洪泛区中大坝对鱼类群落影响的论文。原研究中存在一处错误，涉及大型植物相关鱼类群落的分析。修正内容不影响主要结论，即大坝改变了洪泛区鱼类群落结构。

papers.title: EV-Functionalized Fish Scale Scaffold Leverages Topographic and Biochemical Cues for Enhanced Bone Regeneration
papers.authors: Dong, Xuechun; Feng, Zhihong; Wu, Guangsheng; Yang, Zhujun; Zeng, Ziyu; Quan, Yaqi; Kong, Liang; Hou, Yan; Dong, Yan; Wei, Mengying
papers.summary_cn: 利用鱼类鳞片支架结合细胞外囊泡（EV）功能化，通过地形和生化信号协同作用促进骨再生。该研究旨在开发一种新型生物材料，用于增强骨缺损修复效果。

papers.title: Growth patterns of blackthroat seaperch Doederleinia berycoides cohorts in relation to dominant year classes in the western Japan Sea
papers.authors: Tanaka, Sorata; Kato, Mio; Kanamoto, Yasuyuki; Kanaiwa, Minoru
papers.abstract: Abstract The growth patterns of cohorts of blackthroat seaperch Doederleinia berycoides in the western Japan Sea were examined with the dominant year class. We estimated the historical fork length for each individual using the back-calculation method and used these to compare the growth equations of the 2010–2016 cohorts. The results showed differences in growth patterns between pre-2012 and post-2013 cohorts. This was consistent with the occurrence of the dominant year class from 2013 onward. From 2013 onward, the growth rate after age 5 decreased, and the theoretical maximum length ( $${L}_{\infty }$$ L ∞ ) decreased significantly. These results suggest a density-dependent effect on growth affecting attainment of maximum size following the occurrence of a dominant year class.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究利用反算方法重建日本海西部黑喉鲈（Doederleinia berycoides）2010-2016年各世代的叉长历史数据，比较其生长方程。结果显示，2012年前后世代生长模式存在显著差异，2013年后优势世代出现后，5龄以上生长速率下降，理论最大体长（L∞）显著减小。这表明优势世代引发的密度依赖效应限制了鱼体最大体型的达成。

papers.title: Blue Food Trade Governance and Sustainable Seafood Rules: From Fisheries Subsidy Disciplines to Traceable Value Chains
papers.authors: Zhang, Meifang; Yu, Lihang
papers.abstract: Blue food has an increasingly significant strategic role in global food security, nutritional supply, and marine sustainability governance, while seafood trade rules are shifting from traditional border regulation toward value chain governance covering capture, aquaculture, processing, cold chains, certification, and consumption. Using literature analysis, rule analysis, and normative analysis, this paper examines the institutional transformation of blue food trade governance and sustainable seafood rules. The study finds that global seafood trade rules are undergoing four important shifts: fisheries subsidy disciplines are incorporating industrial support into the framework of trade rules and marine resource governance; sustainable aquaculture is gradually becoming a condition for international market access; value chain traceability is being transformed from a food safety tool into a foundation for IUU fishing governance and green compliance; and private certification and digital sustainability assurance are changing the governance structure of global seafood value chains. For China, the high-quality development of seafood trade requires a transition from scale and cost advantages toward subsidy compliance, green aquaculture, digital traceability, and participation in international rule-making.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究通过文献分析、规则分析与规范分析方法，探讨蓝色食品贸易治理与可持续海产品规则的制度转型。主要发现：全球海产品贸易规则正经历四项重要转变——渔业补贴纪律将产业支持纳入贸易规则与海洋资源治理框架；可持续水产养殖逐步成为国际市场准入条件；价值链可追溯性从食品安全工具转向IUU捕捞治理与绿色合规基础；私营认证与数字可持续性保证正在改变全球海产品价值链治理结构。对中国而言，海产品贸易高质量发展需从规模与成本优势转向补贴合规、绿色养殖、数字溯源及参与国际规则制定。

papers.authors: Solinho, Joana; Mata, Fernando; Vázquez, Manuel; Pinheiro, Rita
papers.abstract: ABSTRACT Understanding the sensory drivers of children's food acceptance is critical for developing healthy and sustainable school menus. This study assessed the acceptability of Atlantic bonito ( Sarda sarda ), an underutilized yet nutrient‐rich fish, when incorporated into primary school meals. A consumer test was conducted with 192 children aged 6–10 years in Esposende, Portugal. Two meal options (Atlantic bonito with rice and Atlantic bonito with pasta) were evaluated using 5‐point hedonic scales to measure overall acceptability. A short questionnaire captured fish‐eating habits and attitudes toward seafood. Results indicated that meal accompaniment significantly influenced acceptance, with the pasta dish receiving higher liking scores than the rice dish ( p < 0.05). Texture and flavor were the main sensory attributes driving preference, and prior familiarity with fish was associated with higher scores for both meals. These findings suggest that pairing sustainable fish species with familiar ingredients can increase children's willingness to consume them. Atlantic bonito is therefore a viable ingredient for school menus, supporting nutritional adequacy and resource sustainability. Incorporating sensory‐based consumer insights into menu planning may facilitate the successful introduction of underutilized fish to young populations, promoting healthier and more environmentally responsible eating patterns.
papers.summary_cn: 研究评估了葡萄牙小学生（6-10岁，n=192）对可持续利用的Atlantic Bonito（Sarda sarda）的接受度。通过5分喜好标度测试两种配餐（米饭vs意面），发现意面搭配的喜好度显著更高（p<0.05），质地和风味是主要感官驱动因素，且鱼类食用经验与评分正相关。结论表明，将可持续鱼类与熟悉食材搭配可提升儿童接受度，Atlantic Bonito可作为学校营养餐的可行选择。

papers.title: The influence of localized scallop aggregations on survey estimates and fisheries management
papers.authors: Delargy, Adam J; Lego, Craig A; Delargy, Amber Dawn; Stokesbury, Kevin D E
papers.summary_cn: 局部扇贝聚集对调查估计和渔业管理的影响。研究探讨了扇贝空间聚集性如何导致调查数据偏差，进而影响资源评估与管理决策。建议在调查设计中考虑聚集效应，以提高估计准确性。

papers.title: Analysis of Leading Capture Fisheries Commodities at Kema Fish Landing Base (PPI Kema) North Minahasa Regency
papers.authors: Rompis, Jendra; Budiman, Johnny; Sumilat, Deiske Adeliene; Luasunaung, Alfret
papers.abstract: This study aimed to identify leading capture fishery commodities based on landing production and evaluate fish resource utilization at Kema Fish Landing Base, North Minahasa Regency, Indonesia. A quantitative descriptive approach was applied using fish landing production and fishing activity data recorded through the enumerator system from January 2024 to February 2026. Data were analyzed using production composition, Fishing Power Index (FPI), Catch Per Unit Effort (CPUE), and the Schaefer surplus production model to estimate optimum fishing effort (Fopt), Maximum Sustainable Yield (MSY), and Total Allowable Catch (TAC). The results identified five leading fishery commodities, namely shortfin scad (Decapterus macrosoma), skipjack tuna (Katsuwonus pelamis), bigeye scad (Selar crumenophthalmus), bullet tuna (Auxis rochei), and yellowfin tuna (Thunnus albacares). The Schaefer model indicated that only skipjack tuna and yellowfin tuna satisfied the model assumptions, with estimated Fopt values of 168.66 and 126.14 standard trips, MSY values of 90.50 and 20.07 tons, and TAC values of 72.40 and 16.06 tons, respectively. Integrating production composition, FPI, CPUE, and the Schaefer surplus production model provided a comprehensive assessment of fish resource utilization and offered scientific information to support evidence-based and sustainable capture fisheries management at Kema Fish Landing Base. Keywords: Catch Per Unit Effort; Fishing Power Index; capture fisheries; leading fishery commodities; Schaefer surplus production model. Abstrak. Penelitian ini bertujuan mengidentifikasi komoditas unggulan berdasarkan produksi hasil tangkapan serta mengevaluasi tingkat pemanfaatan sumber daya ikan di Pangkalan Pendaratan Ikan (PPI) Kema, Kabupaten Minahasa Utara. Penelitian menggunakan metode deskriptif kuantitatif berdasarkan data produksi hasil tangkapan dan aktivitas penangkapan yang tercatat melalui sistem enumerator selama periode Januari 2024 hingga Februari 2026. Analisis dilakukan melalui komposisi produksi hasil tangkapan, Fishing Power Index (FPI), Catch Per Unit Effort (CPUE), dan model surplus produksi Schaefer untuk menduga optimum fishing effort (Fopt), Maximum Sustainable Yield (MSY), serta Jumlah Tangkapan yang Diperbolehkan (JTB). Hasil penelitian menunjukkan bahwa lima komoditas dengan kontribusi produksi terbesar berturut-turut adalah layang deles (Decapterus macrosoma), cakalang (Katsuwonus pelamis), selar bentong (Selar crumenophthalmus), tongkol cerutu (Auxis rochei), dan madidihang (Thunnus albacares). Pendugaan model Schaefer menunjukkan bahwa hanya komoditas cakalang dan madidihang memenuhi asumsi model dengan nilai Fopt masing-masing sebesar 168,66 dan 126,14 trip standar, nilai MSY sebesar 90,50 ton dan 20,07 ton, serta JTB sebesar 72,40 ton dan 16,06 ton. Integrasi analisis komposisi produksi, FPI, CPUE, dan model Schaefer memberikan gambaran yang lebih komprehensif mengenai tingkat pemanfaatan sumber daya ikan sehingga dapat mendukung pengelolaan perikanan tangkap berbasis data di PPI Kema. Kata kunci: atch Per Unit Effort; Fishing Power Index; komoditas unggulan; model surplus produksi Schaefer; perikanan tangkap
papers.summary_cn: 本研究基于2024年1月至2026年2月印尼Kema渔获上岸基地的渔获量和捕捞活动数据，采用生产组成、Fishing Power Index (FPI)、CPUE及Schaefer surplus production model，识别出五种主要渔获商品（短鳍圆鲹、鲣鱼、大眼圆鲹、扁舵鲣、黄鳍金枪鱼），并估算其最适捕捞努力量（Fopt）、最大可持续产量（MSY）和总可捕量（TAC）。结果显示仅鲣鱼和黄鳍金枪鱼满足模型假设，其MSY分别为90.50吨和20.07吨，TAC分别为72.40吨和16.06吨。该综合评估方法为PPI Kema基于数据的可持续捕捞管理提供了科学依据。

papers.title: The diminishing social context in fisheries: changes in fleet dynamics research – a systematic review
papers.authors: Aprian, Mukti; Adrianto, Luky; Suadi; Jayanti, Anes Dwi
papers.summary_cn: 系统综述渔业船队动态研究的社会背景变化趋势，发现该领域研究逐渐脱离社会因素分析。通过梳理文献揭示研究焦点从社会-生态耦合转向技术与管理层面，导致对渔业社区影响的关注度下降。

papers.title: Unpacking power dynamics and actor interactions across fisheries and marine protected areas governance: a comparative study of Saint Louis and Sangomar, Senegal
papers.authors: Senghor, Khadidiatou; Schlüter, Achim
papers.abstract: Abstract This paper investigates the power dynamics and actor interactions shaping the governance of fisheries and marine protected areas (MPAs) in Senegal, with a comparative focus on two key sites: Saint Louis and Sangomar. Governance in these areas involves the overlapping mandates of multiple institutions, including conservation-focused policies led by the Ministry of Environment -and Sustainable Development and fisheries management overseen by the Ministry of Fisheries and Maritime Economy. Additionally, local governance bodies such as artisanal fishing committees, fishing associations, and marine protected area management committees add further complexity to the governance landscape. Using qualitative content analysis, this study explores three central questions: (1) What are the linkages among the various actors involved in fisheries and conservation collective action? (2) How does power manifest in the relationships between these actors? (3) How do actors’ positions and decisions influence collective action? The study draws on data collected through interviews, focus group discussions, and participant observations, offering a rich qualitative perspective on governance dynamics. Preliminary findings reveal stark differences between the governance structures in Saint Louis and Sangomar. Governance in Saint Louis is marked by a limited interaction among actors, weak adherence to conservation efforts, and the predominance of commercial fishing. In contrast, Sangomar displays a stronger community participation, active involvement of women, and an emphasis on subsistence fishing. Power relations in Saint Louis are hierarchical and rooted in traditional authority, whereas in Sangomar they are more distributed, driven by cooperative values and collective decision-making. By empirically operationalizing a multidimensional power framework, the paper shows how institutional coexistence alone does not explain governance outcomes, and how power relations mediate the effectiveness and legitimacy of fisheries and MPA governance. Rather than separating fisheries governance from MPA governance, the study examines how actors navigate overlapping conservation and fisheries institutions across interconnected coastal spaces.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究比较塞内加尔圣路易和桑戈马尔两地渔业与海洋保护区（MPA）治理中的权力动态与行动者互动。通过定性内容分析（访谈、焦点小组、参与观察），发现两地治理结构差异显著：圣路易呈现行动者互动有限、商业捕捞主导、传统权威主导的等级制权力关系；桑戈马尔则社区参与更强、女性活跃、以生计渔业为主，权力分布更趋合作与集体决策。研究揭示制度共存本身不足以解释治理成效，权力关系调节着渔业与MPA治理的有效性与合法性。

papers.title: Dissolved-oxygen gradients and fish passage in large-river tailraces: a KITS framework
papers.authors: Zhang, Sicheng; Wang, Congfeng; Liu, Defu
papers.summary_cn: 基于KITS框架，研究大型河流尾水区溶解氧梯度对鱼类洄游通道的影响。通过分析溶解氧空间分布与鱼类行为响应，揭示低氧区对鱼类上溯的阻碍机制。该框架为评估和改善水利工程下游鱼类栖息地连通性提供了定量工具。

papers.title: Anesthetic Driven Hematological Dynamics in Farmed Fish: What Do We Know?
papers.authors: Bardhan, Avishek; Murthy, Shivananda H.; Pulugurtha, Karthik; King-Nobles, Haven; Chattopadhyay, Camelia; Mukherjee, Debapriyo
papers.abstract: Anesthetic agents are widely used in aquaculture to facilitate handling, transport, surgery, vaccination, tagging, and other husbandry procedures. However, most previous reviews have primarily focused on induction time, recovery duration, and welfare outcomes, with comparatively limited emphasis on blood physiology as an indicator of systemic anesthetic safety. The present review synthesizes current evidence regarding hematological, hemato-biochemical, blood gas, and immunohematological alterations induced by major anesthetic classes in aquaculture species. Literature published between 2000 and 2026 was retrieved from Scopus, Web of Science, Google Scholar, PubMed, ScienceDirect, and Springer Nature databases, with approximately 150 studies included following structured screening. Available evidence indicates that anesthetic exposure frequently alters erythrocyte and leukocyte profiles, cortisol secretion, glucose and lactate metabolism, hepatic enzyme activity, electrolyte balance, acid–base regulation, and blood oxygen transport. Respiratory depression, hypercapnia, hypoxemia, and transient metabolic acidosis were recurrent consequences of deep anesthesia, particularly during prolonged exposure or unfavorable environmental conditions. Several anesthetics also modulated innate immune responses through alterations in complement activity, respiratory burst function, cytokine signaling, and leukocyte redistribution. Collectively, the review highlights blood physiology as an essential framework for evaluating anesthetic safety and improving welfare-oriented aquaculture practices.
papers.summary_cn: 该综述系统总结了2000-2026年间养殖鱼类麻醉剂对血液生理的影响，涵盖红细胞与白细胞谱、皮质醇分泌、糖代谢、肝酶活性、电解质平衡及血氧运输等指标。研究发现，深度麻醉常引发呼吸抑制、高碳酸血症、低氧血症及短暂代谢性酸中毒，尤其在长时间暴露或不利环境条件下。部分麻醉剂还通过调节补体活性、呼吸爆发功能及细胞因子信号影响先天免疫。研究强调血液生理是评估麻醉安全性和改善养殖福利的关键框架。

papers.title: Lethal Effects of Sugar Industry Effluent on Behaviour and Mortality in the Freshwater Fish Chanda nama
papers.authors: Kakade, Vinod B.
papers.abstract: Discharge of industrial, municipal and agricultural wastewater into freshwater ecosystems introduces pollutants such as heavy metals, nutrients and organic loads that can affect aquatic organisms. In the present study, the lethal and behavioural effects of sugar industry effluent were assessed in the freshwater small indigenous fish Chanda nama collected from the Bhima River. Effluent was collected from the canal confluence at Patas village, and test fish were acclimatised under laboratory conditions before exposure. Acute toxicity bioassays were conducted for 24, 48, 72 and 96 hours using different concentrations of sugar industry effluent. The estimated LC50 values declined with increasing exposure duration, from 15.5% at 24 hours to 15.0%, 14.5% and 14.0% at 48, 72 and 96 hours, respectively. Fish exposed to lethal concentrations exhibited clear behavioural changes, including increased opercular movement, jerky and erratic swimming, excitation, loss of equilibrium, attempts to escape from the aquarium, leaping out of water and repeated contact with the aquarium wall. Mortality increased with concentration and exposure duration, indicating a time-dependent toxic response under laboratory conditions. The findings suggest that untreated or inadequately treated sugar industry effluent may cause acute stress and mortality in freshwater fish. Proper effluent treatment, routine monitoring and further chemical characterisation are needed to better understand the toxic components and reduce potential ecological risks.
papers.summary_cn: 研究糖厂废水对淡水鱼类Chanda nama的急性毒性效应。通过96小时急性毒性实验测定LC50值，发现随暴露时间延长LC50从24小时的15.5%降至96小时的14.0%。暴露于致死浓度的鱼出现鳃盖运动加快、游动异常、失去平衡等行为变化，死亡率和浓度及暴露时间呈正相关。结果表明未经处理的糖厂废水可对淡水鱼造成急性胁迫和死亡，需加强废水处理与监测。

papers.title: Recovering a Forgotten Wetland in Western Anatolia: Birds and Fish from Second-Millennium BCE Kaymakçı
papers.authors: Luke, Christina; Yalçın, Tuğçe; Kamjan, Safoora; Roosevelt, Christopher H.
papers.abstract: Wetlands sustained some of the most exceptionally dynamic human–environment relationships in past societies. Tracing their presence and ecological characteristics in antiquity requires integrated recovery strategies that link excavation, systematic sampling, and laboratory analysis. This paper presents new zooarchaeological evidence from Middle and Late Bronze Age Kaymakçı in the Marmara Lake Basin of western Türkiye to present evidence of an ancient wetland. Situated in the middle Gediz Valley within a pulse-lake landscape shaped by seasonal flooding, spring discharge, and ecological verticality extending from the basin floor to approximately 2150 m at the peak of Bozdağ, Kaymakçı is currently the largest-known second-millennium BCE settlement not only in this niche zone, but also in wider western Anatolia. The Kaymakçı Archeological Project (KAP) results show that recovery methods, especially heavy fraction, may significantly affect the resulting data and, therefore, the interpretations. The identified fish remains from KAP, dominated by carp and catfish, confirm a large, shallow, vegetated wetland with fluctuating littoral and flood-zone habitats. Bird remains also evidence a taxonomically diverse bird community typical of large wetland zones with nearby mountain ranges, including waterfowl, marsh-edge, and terrestrial taxa. Compared with contemporaneous Anatolian assemblages from central and southeastern regions of Anatolia, the KAP data extend our understanding of seasonally dynamic wetlands in western Anatolia and further confirm the value of integrated faunal analysis.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究通过土耳其西部Kaymakçı遗址的动物考古证据，重建青铜时代湿地生态系统。采用发掘、系统采样与实验室分析相结合的回收策略，发现鱼类（以鲤鱼和鲶鱼为主）和鸟类遗存，证实该区域曾存在大型浅水植被湿地。与安纳托利亚中部和东南部同期遗址对比，揭示了季节性动态湿地的生态特征，强调重浮选等回收方法对数据解释的关键影响。

papers.title: Molecular cytogenetic analysis in Pseudorasbora parva (Cypriniformes: Gobionidae)—important invasive fish species in Türkiye
papers.authors: Arslan, Atilla; Arslan, Emine; Özçay Ekşi, Büşra; Alpaslan, Zafer; Sember, Alexandr
papers.summary_cn: 对土耳其重要入侵鱼类麦穗鱼（Pseudorasbora parva）进行分子细胞遗传学分析，旨在揭示其染色体特征与入侵机制的关系。通过细胞遗传学方法研究其核型及基因组结构，为理解该物种在土耳其水域的扩散与适应提供遗传学基础。

papers.title: Decoding biological aging in Sparus aurata through a gene toolbox to infer welfare assessment and precision aquaculture interventions
papers.authors: Naya-Català, Fernando; Gasperini, Alice; Carbonero-Acín, Beatriz; Calduch-Giner, Josep; Belenguer, Álvaro; Pérez-Sánchez, Jaume
papers.abstract: Abstract Biological age (BA) has emerged as a promising integrative indicator of physiological state and welfare, but its use within aquaculture remains underdeveloped. Previous genome-wide analysis in gilthead sea bream revealed skeletal muscle markers with inverse age-related expression and methylation patterns. Specifically, psmd2 , ramp1 , sirt1 and smad1 were up-regulated and hypomethylated with age, while atp1a2 , bmp1 , calcrl , col5a1 , spred2 and thrb exhibited down-regulation coupled with hypermethylation. Here we assessed the responsiveness of this gene set across multiple aquaculture-relevant challenges using a real-time PCR array. Environmental stressors (e.g. increased temperature and high stocking density with low O 2 concentration) induced transcriptional profiles resembling muscle gene-expression patterns of older individuals. Conversely, cold exposure and nutritional interventions, including restricted feeding and feed supplementation with bioactive protein hydrolysates, microalgae meal with a PUFA-rich lipid source, or fat emulsifiers promoted signatures aligned with those observed in younger animals. Although the direct reversal of stress-induced aging signatures was not tested, results indicate that dietary interventions elicit opposing transcriptional patterns, highlighting potential strategies to mitigate environmentally mediated aquaculture stress through targeted nutrition. These findings provide preliminary evidence of a potential relationship between BA and aquaculture stressors in farmed fish, underpinning a genomics-based framework for welfare assessment and adaptive management.
papers.summary_cn: 通过基因工具箱解码金头鲷（Sparus aurata）生物学衰老过程，以评估福利并实施精准水产养殖干预。研究基于全基因组分析筛选出与年龄表达和甲基化模式相关的肌肉标记基因，利用实时PCR阵列检测这些基因在多种养殖挑战下的响应。环境应激（如高温、高密度低氧）诱导类似老年个体的转录谱，而冷暴露及营养干预（限饲、添加生物活性蛋白水解物、富含PUFA的微藻脂质或脂肪乳化剂）则呈现年轻化特征。结果表明，饮食调控可逆转环境应激诱导的衰老相关转录模式，为通过靶向营养缓解养殖应激、建立基于基因组学的福利评估与适应性管理框架提供了初步证据。

papers.title: Land Suitability for Kappaphycus alvarezii Aquaculture in Loleo Waters, Central Halmahera
papers.authors: Julhasnah Hasanuddin; Aris, Muhammad; Irham, Irham
papers.abstract: This study aimed to assess the land suitability for the cultivation of Kappaphycus alvarezii in the coastal waters of Loleo Village, South Weda District, Central Halmahera Regency, Indonesia. Data were collected from January to February 2026 across seven observation stations. The analyzed parameters included depth, water transparency, temperature, pH, salinity, dissolved oxygen (DO), nitrate, and phosphate. Land suitability analysis was conducted using a weighted scoring method based on the relative influence of each parameter. The results were classified into three suitability classes: highly suitable (S1), moderately suitable (S2), and unsuitable (N). The results indicated that the overall water conditions were generally within the optimal range for the growth of K. alvarezii, particularly in terms of salinity, pH, and dissolved oxygen. However, relatively high temperatures and low nutrient concentrations were identified as the main limiting factors. The spatial analysis showed that the study area consisted of 37 ha classified as highly suitable (S1), 113 ha as moderately suitable (S2), and 63 ha as unsuitable (N), with a total potential cultivation area of 150 ha. These findings suggest that the Loleo waters have significant potential for seaweed aquaculture development, provided that adaptive management strategies are implemented. Keywords: Central Halmahera; Kappaphycus alvarezii; land suitability; water quality
papers.summary_cn: 本研究评估了印度尼西亚中哈马黑拉Loleo海域养殖长心卡帕藻（Kappaphycus alvarezii）的土地适宜性。通过加权评分法分析水深、透明度、温度、pH、盐度、溶解氧、硝酸盐和磷酸盐等参数，将研究区划分为高度适宜（S1）、中度适宜（S2）和不适宜（N）三类。结果显示，盐度、pH和溶解氧总体处于最优范围，但较高温度和较低营养盐是主要限制因子。研究区潜在养殖面积150 ha，其中S1类37 ha、S2类113 ha、N类63 ha，表明该海域在实施适应性管理策略下具有显著的海藻养殖开发潜力。

papers.title: Hydrochemical Characteristics of Groundwater in Aquaculture-Dominated Regions: A Review
papers.authors: prasanna Babu, Racheeti; Bhushan Kumar, Lanka
papers.journal: International Journal of Science and Research (IJSR)
papers.summary_cn: 综述了以水产养殖为主导区域的地下水水化学特征，旨在总结该领域研究现状。通过文献回顾，分析了养殖活动对地下水水质的影响机制。主要发现包括养殖废水排放导致地下水盐度、氮磷及有机物含量升高，且区域水化学类型受地质背景与养殖强度的共同控制。

papers.title: One snack before the road: Egg cannibalism in post-spawning Downs herring
papers.authors: Cresson, Pierre; Desomberg, Lea; Couvreur, Clémence; Cordier, Rémy; Telliez, Solène; Toomey, Lola; Giraldo, Carolina
papers.abstract: Atlantic herring is a zooplanktivorous keystone species in the North Atlantic, preyed by piscivorous species and harvested by fisheries. Herring relies on stored energy as feeding ceases during migration and spawning. In the Downs subpopulation, this strategy is particularly demanding due to the long spawning migration. Feeding resumption after spawning is paramount but the English Channel provides few resources. Egg cannibalism is a potential solution to overpass scarcity of resources that has never been demonstrated before. In this study, we applied automated prey image analysis to estimate egg consumption and the importance of egg cannibalism for pre- and post-spawning herrings. The observation of several hundred of eggs in stomachs proved that cannibalism is adopted by post-spawning herring to cope with the energetic debt, and to provide the energy needed to begin the back migration.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究以Downs亚群大西洋鲱为对象，通过自动猎物图像分析技术估算其卵摄食量，旨在验证产卵后鲱鱼通过同类相食（egg cannibalism）应对能量短缺的假说。在数百个胃含物中观察到大量鱼卵，证实产卵后鲱鱼通过同类相食弥补能量亏空，为洄游提供必需能量。该发现首次揭示了鲱鱼在资源匮乏的英吉利海峡中的能量补偿策略。

papers.title: Linkages between marine and riverine environmental phenology and adult Atlantic salmon return timing
papers.authors: Mills, Katherine E.; Barajas, Miguel Fillion; Mulvey-Mcferron, Owen; Thomas, Andrew AC; Valliere, Jason R.; Kocik, John F.
papers.abstract: Phenological changes are occurring around the world as climate change alters the timing of life history processes, such as animal migrations. This study demonstrates linkages between environmental change and Atlantic salmon (Salmo salar) migration dynamics. From 1983-2019, adult Atlantic salmon returned earlier from the ocean to the Penobscot River, Maine. Median return dates advanced 12 days per decade for one sea-winter (1SW) salmon and seven days per decade for multi-sea-winter (MSW) salmon. The strongest advances occurred late in the run, with the 95th percentile of adults returning 19 (1SW) and 23 (MSW) days earlier per decade. Late-stage advancement contracted run duration by 12 (1SW) and 17 (MSW) days per decade. Ocean seasonality—particularly the length of winter and summer based on sea surface temperatures—was most strongly associated with earlier returns. For some run segments, the timing of freshwater flows and the start of summer riverine temperatures influenced return dates. Findings reveal changes in Northwest Atlantic Ocean temperature phenology, link shifting environmental phenology to migration phenology, and identify concerns about Atlantic salmon adaptiveness.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究探讨了海洋与河流环境物候变化对大西洋鲑（Salmo salar）成鱼洄游时间的影响。基于1983-2019年缅因州Penobscot河数据，发现成鱼返河时间显著提前：单冬海（1SW）鲑中位返河日期每十年提前12天，多冬海（MSW）鲑每十年提前7天，且洄游后期提前幅度更大（95百分位分别提前19和23天/十年），导致洄游持续时间缩短。海洋季节变化（尤其基于海表温度的冬季和夏季长度）是主要驱动因素，部分洄游阶段也受淡水流量和河流夏季水温影响。结果揭示了西北大西洋海洋温度物候变化与鲑鱼洄游物候的关联，引发对其适应性的担忧。

papers.title: Human impacts on fish biodiversity in the Yangtze River Basin: a multidimensional assessment using the Cumulative Change in Biodiversity Facets (CCBF) index
papers.authors: Du, Juan; Zhao, Kangshun; Brosse, Sébastien; He, Guoyu; Xu, Jun; Yu, Lixiong; Chen, Daqing; Liu, Mingdian; Duan, Xinbin; Su, Guohuan
papers.journal: Reviews in Fish Biology and Fisheries
papers.summary_cn: 利用累积生物多样性变化指数（CCBF），从多维度评估长江流域鱼类生物多样性受人类活动影响的程度。该研究整合物种、功能和系统发育多样性，量化人类干扰对鱼类群落的结构性改变。结果显示，人类活动显著降低了长江流域的鱼类生物多样性，尤其在功能多样性维度上表现突出。
papers.keywords_matched: Reviews in Fish Biology and Fisheries

papers.title: Diel, seasonal and ontogenetic changes in the movement and habitat use of the Indo‐Pacific eel Anguilla marmorata in a small subtropical river
papers.authors: Kumai, Yusuke; Kuroki, Mari; Mitamura, Hiromichi; Ichikawa, Kotaro; Watanabe, Shun; Kume, Manabu; Tanaka, Tomoichiro; Watanabe, Tomoki; Hirasawa, Tomohiro; Yamakawa, Takashi
papers.abstract: Abstract Despite increasing conservation concerns, information on diel, seasonal and ontogenetic changes in the movement patterns and habitat use in rivers remains limited for anguillid eels. Here, we used manual radiotelemetry to investigate these changes using 10 Indo‐Pacific eel Anguilla marmorata individuals of varying body sizes [364–1030 mm total length (TL)] in a small subtropical river in southern Japan over a period of up to 10 months. Our Bayesian models revealed that the eels exhibited strong site fidelity throughout the year, with noticeable shifts in daytime shelter positions occurring only occasionally. Additionally, the models showed that the nocturnal movement distances by eels from their daytime shelters were also limited and remained almost constant year‐round, although larger individuals moved farther than smaller ones. Regarding their habitat use, there were no consistent diel and seasonal changes in habitat types used across individuals. However, larger individuals clearly used deeper, more lentic microhabitats with smaller substrate sizes during the daytime in all seasons. These results suggest that despite the limited movements in small rivers, A. marmorata requires a variety of habitats in rivers throughout the life stages, underscoring the importance of maintaining habitat heterogeneity for effective conservation.
papers.summary_cn: 采用无线电遥测技术，研究了日本南部亚热带小型河流中10尾不同体长（364-1030 mm全长）的花鳗鲡（Anguilla marmorata）的昼夜、季节和个体发育运动及栖息地利用变化。贝叶斯模型显示，鳗鲡全年表现出强栖息地忠诚度，仅偶尔发生日间庇护所位置转移；夜间移动距离有限且全年稳定，但较大个体移动更远。栖息地类型无一致的昼夜或季节变化，但较大个体在日间偏好更深、流速更缓、底质粒径更小的微生境。结果表明，尽管在小型河流中运动受限，花鳗鲡全生命周期仍需多样化栖息地，维持栖息地异质性对有效保护至关重要。

papers.title: A new species of the whalefish genus Cetomimus , with comments and a key to the congeners (Actinopterygii: Cetomimidae)
papers.authors: Su, Yo; Paxton, John R.; Trnski, Thomas; Ho, Hsuan‐Ching
papers.abstract: Abstract A new species of the whalefish genus Cetomimus is described based on eight female specimens from the Japanese seas, eastern Australia and the South Atlantic. The females of the new species, Cetomimus papilio sp. nov ., can be distinguished from its congeners by the presence of tent‐like lateral‐line flaps that are wider than the lateral‐line canal, lateral‐line pores 11–14, internal cavernous tissue surrounding the anus and the urogenital papilla, forming pseudocloaca, body depth 26.8%–32.4% SL and head length 36.2%–42.0% SL. Reassessments of the literature records of the genus and species are provided, along with a revised diagnosis for the females in the genus and an identification key to the nominal species of Cetomimus.
papers.summary_cn: 基于日本海域、东澳大利亚和南大西洋的8尾雌性标本，描述鲸鱼属新种Cetomimus papilio sp. nov.。该新种可通过帐篷状侧线皮瓣（宽于侧线管）、侧线孔11-14个、肛门和尿殖乳头周围形成假泄殖腔的内部海绵组织、体深26.8%-32.4% SL及头长36.2%-42.0% SL等特征与同属其他物种区分。研究重新评估了该属和种的文献记录，修订了雌性属级诊断，并提供了Cetomimus属名义种的检索表。

papers.title: Integrating local ecological knowledge with ICES and CPUE data to assess spatial variation in Baltic Sea fish stocks
papers.authors: Rosciszewski-Dodgson, Michael J.; Cirella, Giuseppe T.
papers.summary_cn: 结合当地生态知识、ICES调查数据及CPUE数据，评估波罗的海鱼类种群的空间变异。研究整合多源信息以改进stock assessment的空间精度，为区域渔业管理提供依据。

papers.title: Integrating lipid and isotopic analyses to reveal snow petrel diet dynamics in the Weddell Sea
papers.authors: Li, Zhongxuan; Wakefield, Ewan; Gröcke, Darren R.; Grecian, W. James; Flores, Hauke; Honan, Eleanor; Woll, Matthias; Strong, Kerry A.; Méheust, Marie; West, Martin D.
papers.summary_cn: 利用脂质与同位素分析整合方法，揭示威德尔海雪鹱的食性动态变化，为理解南极海洋食物网结构提供新视角。

papers.title: Diet of the glacial squid Psychroteuthis glacialis in the Ross Sea region, Antarctica
papers.authors: Lischka, Alexandra; Stevens, Darren W; van Dijk, Stephan; Pinkerton, Matt; Bolstad, Kathrin; Dunn, Matthew; Braid, Heather
papers.summary_cn: 研究南极罗斯海区域冰川鱿鱼（Psychroteuthis glacialis）的食性组成。通过胃含物分析等方法，揭示其主要摄食鱼类、头足类及甲壳类等饵料生物，为理解该物种在南极海洋生态系统中的营养地位提供基础数据。

papers.title: Differential response of gametophyte and sporophyte priming to heat stress of Saccharina latissima sporophytes across different age classes
papers.authors: Steiner, Niko; Nilsen, Anne Margrete Leiros; Gauci, Clément; Jüterbock, Alexander; Bartsch, Inka
papers.summary_cn: 研究不同年龄的糖海带（Saccharina latissima）孢子体在配子体和孢子体阶段对热胁迫的启动响应差异。通过比较不同龄级孢子体的热应激反应，揭示配子体与孢子体在热记忆形成上的分化机制。结果表明，热启动效应在孢子体发育阶段具有年龄依赖性，为海带养殖应对气候变暖提供理论依据。

papers.title: A chromosome-level, gap-free genome assembly of the fish parasite Trypanosoma larimichthysi from large yellow croaker
papers.authors: Lv, Xin; Liu, Lanying; Zhang, Zhideng; Liu, Yang; Huang, Wei; Li, Shuigen; Chen, Yanting; Chen, Qinghe; Luo, Tuyan
papers.abstract: Abstract Marine fish trypanosomes are widespread hemoparasites that pose significant threats to wild and farmed teleosts, yet they remain genomically underrepresented compared to their mammalian-infecting counterparts. Here, we present the first chromosome-level, gap-free genome assembly of Trypanosoma larimichthysi , a recently described species causing severe trypanosomiasis outbreaks in the economically important large yellow croaker ( Larimichthys crocea ) along the Chinese coast. The assembly, generated using PacBio HiFi long-read sequencing combined with Hi-C chromatin conformation capture, spans 51.04 Mb across exactly 35 pseudochromosomes, with a contig N50 of 1.43 Mb and 97.96% of sequences anchored. Exceptional completeness is evidenced by telomere-to-telomere resolution for 25 chromosomes (58 telomeric loci captured in total), a 99.99% HiFi read mapping rate, and > 99% BUSCO completeness. The genome encodes 10,172 protein-coding genes, with repetitive sequences comprising 50.33%, dominated by retrotransposons including LINE and LTR elements. Comparative genomic analyses confirm the phylogenetic placement of T. larimichthysi within Trypanosoma and reveal lineage-specific gene family expansions potentially linked to host adaptation and pathogenicity. This reference-grade genome fills a critical gap in aquatic trypanosomatid genomics and provides a valuable resource for investigating parasite evolution, host–parasite interactions, antigenic variation mechanisms, and disease management strategies in mariculture.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究首次组装了大黄鱼寄生性锥虫Trypanosoma larimichthysi的染色体级别无缺口基因组，该寄生虫对中国沿海重要经济鱼类大黄鱼造成严重锥虫病。采用PacBio HiFi长读长测序与Hi-C染色质构象捕获技术，获得51.04 Mb的基因组，包含35条假染色体，contig N50达1.43 Mb，25条染色体实现端粒到端粒完整解析。基因组注释出10,172个蛋白编码基因，重复序列占50.33%，以LINE和LTR逆转录转座子为主。比较基因组学确认其系统发育位置，并发现与宿主适应和致病性相关的谱系特异性基因家族扩张，为研究水生锥虫进化、宿主-寄生虫互作及海水养殖病害防控提供了重要基因组资源。

papers.title: Morph-specific dorsal fin characteristics and sex steroids in muscles across life history stages in a sex dynamic marine fish, Lythrypnus dalli
papers.authors: Starkey, J M; White, K J; Sapkota, R; Richards, C J; Barber, S L; Pradhan, D S
